case_title: RHEAMARIE LUDOVICO VS. BORIANA FOODS LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUDOVICO, RHEAMARIE AS TO DEFENDANT BORIANA FOODS LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA CAFFE COVA DIMONTE FOODS LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA CAFFE COVA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
